title: TaskList — MERN Task Manager
description: A simple full-stack web app for recording and managing daily tasks, built with the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js).

title: Lucene Search Engine
description: Java-based information retrieval system built on Apache Lucene — implements indexing, ranking, and full-text search over document collections.

title: Full-Stack Web Scraper
description: MERN stack application with Puppeteer automating data extraction from web pages, improving data collection efficiency by 30%. Built during internship at gCurv Technologies.

title: Python Mini Projects
description: A collection of small Python projects and Jupyter notebooks exploring data analysis, automation, and algorithmic problem-solving.

title: Web Page Testing with Selenium
description: A Python-based test automation tool using Selenium for data validation and system reliability analysis with statistical checks for error detection.

title: Resume Analysis Web App
description: A Streamlit web app that analyses resumes using Pyresparser and provides personalised suggestions and tips to improve them.

title: LeetCode Solutions
description: An organised collection of Java solutions to LeetCode problems — covering data structures, algorithms, and problem-solving patterns.

title: SkillRack Problem Solutions
description: C language solutions to SkillRack coding practice problems — focused on building fundamentals in pointers, strings, arrays, and algorithms.
